hooks.command: echo 'Migration commit check: verifying no Angular source modifications...' && git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q '^src/app/' && echo 'ERROR: Angular source files are READ-ONLY during migration. Do not modify files in src/app/.' && exit 1 || echo 'OK: No Angular source files modified.'
hooks.description: Prevents accidental modifications to Angular source files during migration
Run TypeScript type checking after saving files
Run ESLint on saved TypeScript/React files
